title: 2026 Oscars Best Actor Predictions
text: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) is favored to win, with momentum from his Actor Awards victory. His Actor Awards win proved pivotal, backed by fellow actors who comprise the Academy's largest voting bloc. Ethan Hawke (Blue Moon) is a Could Win alternative. The four-time nominee has built decades of goodwill across the industry and maintains strong international support despite statistical disadvantages. Wagner Moura (The Secret Agent) is described as Should Win choice. He captured the Golden Globe but missed BAFTA and SAG nominations, though distributor Neon's aggressive campaign kept him visible to voters. Leonardo DiCaprio (One Battle After Another) is listed as a plausible upset contender with strong support within the Academy. Timothée Chalamet (Marty Supreme) early frontrunner status faded significantly. The commentary notes his campaign style drew criticism, relegating him to the same precarious position as other early-season favorites who ultimately fell short. The race remains unusually competitive, with industry respect and voter goodwill potentially influencing outcomes beyond traditional metrics.
